search_query: are mosquitoes drawn to foot odor
combined_text: Why do mosquitoes go for the ankles? It could be because your FEET smell: Scientists find insects are attracted to certain body odour "Why do mosquitoes go for the ankles? It could be because your FEET smell: Scientists find insects are attracted to certain body odour Mosquitoes find victims by detecting carbon dioxide and skin odour They do this using olfactory neurons situated around the insects’ mouths Researchers tested these
